name: //VEYONIS AU// The Eve Club ❆ All I Want for Christmas (Is YOU)
description:
"Oh shit. Smike's here."

// CHAPTER 6 //

// CHAPTER 6 - ALL I WANT FOR CHRISTMAS (IS YOU) //

A Mercenary Christmas Carol (and a Veyonis AU)

Nicholas wasn't satisfied with the beach volleyball mission—so he sent backup. Smike arrives at the penthouse unannounced: mute, lethally dangerous, and completely uninterested in Rosen. The mission is simple: observe Sun Yee On activity in Chinatown's night market. No infiltration. No spectacle. Just reconnaissance. Kadence pairs everyone off for cover—couples draw less attention than solo operatives.

Toronto's night market glows with red lanterns and dangerous secrets. Choose your partner. Try not to start a war. And whatever you do, don't let Rosen convince Smike that aggressive flirting counts as tactical communication.

WELCOME TO TORONTO'S CRIMINAL UNDERWORLD

Beneath Toronto's polished skyline thrives a sprawling shadow economy of mercenaries, syndicates, and black-market brokers. These aren't urban legends—they're celebrities. Everyone knows their names, their symbols, their scandals. The criminal factions operate openly enough to sponsor raves and make headlines, yet remain untouchable thanks to the Council of Shadows, a governing body that mediates wars and enforces market rules. You've just stumbled into their world, and there's no walking out the same.

THE EVE CLUB

An elite six-woman mercenary crew hiding in plain sight as Toronto University students and faculty. The Eve Club specializes in extractions, assassinations, and high-risk acquisitions. Their current roster includes:

KADENCE "KRAMPUS" GOTTLIEB-LEVITSEN

The Latvian tactician. Cold, elegant, ruthless. Your philosophy professor by day, executioner by night.

ROSEN "NOËL" JUSTICE

The Tennessee pyromaniac. Unhinged demolitions expert with a flamethrower and zero impulse control.

MIKA "MISTLETOE" BECK

The Danish infiltrator. Goth influencer, seduction specialist, and the reason you woke up zip-tied to a chair.

ERKA "SPARKLEBOMB"

The schizophrenic explosives artist. Talks to her Adam Sandler cutout. Documents everything. Terrifyingly creative.
creator: Gabesap
